features.title: DB schema extension：order_ticket + fill_journal_entry + account_snapshot 3 表 + Alembic + Repository
features.acceptance: workbench/backend/workbench_api/db/models/ 加 3 个 SQLAlchemy 模型（OrderTicket / FillJournalEntry / AccountSnapshot）+ 配套 repositories/ 含 latest() / list_by_ticket() / reconcile() helpers（沿 B021 F002 base.py 通用 5 方法 pattern）。新 Alembic migration versions/0002_b023_execution_workflow.py 建 3 表 + 索引（fills.ticket_id + snapshots.snapshot_at desc）。**v0.9.25 #1b 强制：** 改 workbench/deploy/scripts/deploy.sh schema-assert `required` 集为 {account, backlog_entry, snapshot_meta, order_ticket, fill_journal_entry, account_snapshot}（6 表）。验收：alembic upgrade head 新库建 6 表，再跑 noop；Repository round-trip pytest 每模型；本地 dev WORKBENCH_DB_URL=sqlite:///./workbench-dev.db 工作；deploy.sh schema-assert 列 6 表 + 故意 throwaway commit 漏一表 → CI fail；安全 regression（禁 psycopg2/mysqlclient/pymongo/broker SDK）仍绿；backend pytest+ruff+mypy 全清。

features.title: Position diff page + Account state edit UI
features.acceptance: Backend：GET /api/execution/position-diff?as_of=<date> 返 {current:AccountSnapshot, target:TargetPositions, diff:[{symbol, current_shares, target_shares, delta_shares(signed +买-卖), delta_weight, delta_dollar, reason}], unmatched}；GET /api/execution/account/latest 返最新 snapshot；PUT /api/execution/account 接 {cash, base_currency, positions} 插新 AccountSnapshot(source=ui_edit)。Frontend：(protected)/execution/position-diff/page.tsx — AllocationBar 当前 vs target + 每行 diff DataTable（signed delta with --color-up/--color-down tokens 来自 B022 F001）；(protected)/execution/account/page.tsx — 表单编辑账户提交→PUT→toast。验收：fixture account + fixture target 渲染正确（无需真 OAuth）；diff 符号正确（delta_shares>0 当 target>current）；account 表单 validate（weights ≤1、cash≥0、无重复 symbol）；提交后 Recommendations + Position-diff 立刻反映新状态；CSV export 工作；Vitest+Playwright+httpx 全过；same-origin fetch（v0.9.24 #3）。

features.title: Order ticket 生成 + viewer + Markdown 导出
features.acceptance: Backend：POST /api/execution/tickets 消费 position-diff 生成新 ticket，写 Markdown 到 docs/runs/<YYYY-MM-DD>/order-ticket-<id>.md（已 ship release tarball per v0.9.25 #1c）+ 插 order_ticket 行；GET /api/execution/tickets 列表 paginated；GET /api/execution/tickets/{id} 详情；POST /api/execution/tickets/{id}/void 翻 status→voided。Markdown 模板含 disclaimer 字面串 'research-only; this is a manual review checklist, not a trading instruction'（unit test 断言）+ 'Trades to place' 表 + 'After execution checklist' 段。Frontend：(protected)/execution/ticket/page.tsx 显最新 ticket + Generate/Void 按钮 + Markdown preview + Download；(protected)/execution/ticket/[id]/page.tsx 历史只读。验收：generate 端到端产 DB row + Markdown 文件；list+detail viewer 工作 ≥3 历史 tickets seeded；void 不可 reconcile；任何按钮 labelled 'execute'/'place order'/'send to broker' 禁（Vitest grep + Playwright assert）；same-origin path、build artifact 无 127.0.0.1（v0.9.24 #3 regression）。

features.title: Fill journal upload (CSV + 手工) + preview
features.acceptance: Backend：POST /api/execution/fills 接 multipart CSV 或 JSON {ticket_id, fills:[...]}；validate 每 fill matches ticket order_seq 或 flag --unmatched；插 fill_journal_entry 行。CSV 解析用 csv stdlib + Pydantic per-row validation；错误返 400 含 row-level 详情 {row:N, error:'...'}。GET /api/execution/fills?ticket_id=<id> 返该 ticket 全部 fills。Frontend：(protected)/execution/fills/page.tsx 上传 CSV（shadcn input type=file）+ 手工 entry table 单行 fill；上传后 preview view 每 fill match ticket 行用户 confirm before commit。验收：上传 3 fixture CSV（Schwab/IBKR/generic）每个 ≤5 LOC adapter glue parse 成功；手工 entry validate 客户端+服务端（positive shares / valid date / ticket 中已知 symbol）；unmatched fills flag user prompt 不 auto-reject；Vitest+Playwright+contract test。

features.title: Reconciliation + journal history + slippage analytics
features.acceptance: Backend：POST /api/execution/reconcile/{ticket_id} 匹配 fills 算 slippage 插新 account_snapshot(source=fill_reconcile)+ flip ticket.status=executed+executed_at；GET /api/execution/journal-history?since=<date> 返过去 tickets + fills + slippage 摘要（per-ticket avg bps + fill count）；GET /api/execution/slippage-analytics?window=<3m|6m|1y> 返 rolling avg slippage bps + outliers + trend。Frontend：(protected)/execution/journal-history/page.tsx — DataTable 过去 tickets + expand-row 见 fills + slippage；sortable/filterable/CSV export；per-ticket detail AllocationBar intended vs realized + slippage 折线图（lightweight-charts area）。验收：reconcile 端到端 fixture ticket+fills 插正确新 snapshot + slippage；idempotent（跑两次不 dupe snapshot）；journal history 渲 12 月 fixture data 可 sortable；slippage bps = (fill_price - reference_close) / reference_close * 10000 signed per trade direction 正确算；Vitest+Playwright+contract。

features.title: Risk panel + kill-switch alert UI
features.acceptance: Backend：GET /api/execution/risk-panel 返 {master_dd, kill_switch_threshold(0.15 per B011), kill_switch_triggered:bool, per_sleeve_dd:{...}, slippage_trend_3m_bps}；若 triggered 同时返 alternative_defensive_ticket（全 defensive sleeve 的另一 ticket）。Frontend：Recommendations page header banner（B022 F010 extension）—— 绿=全 OK / 黄=任一 sleeve DD>8% / 红=kill-switch triggered。红时 page 显示并排「normal ticket」vs「defensive ticket」+ radio button 让用户选；generate-ticket honor 选择。验收：3 fixture state 渲染正确（all-OK / yellow per-sleeve DD / red kill-switch with alternative ticket visible）；generate-ticket honors user 选择；Vitest+Playwright。

features.title: Docs refresh + manual-execution runbook + 截图
features.acceptance: (1) docs/dev/workbench-architecture.md 更新含 B023 5 新页 + workflow state machine 图 + DB schema 图（6 表）；(2) 新 docs/dev/workbench-manual-execution-runbook.md：端到端用户流（open Recommendations → generate ticket → 在 broker app 执行 → upload fills → reconcile → 看 slippage），每步含命令/点击/预期结果 + 3 CSV format 示例（Schwab/IBKR/generic）；(3) docs/screenshots/ 加 B023 5 新页截图（PNG ≤ 300 KB each）；(4) workbench/README.md reference docs 段刷新；(5) CLAUDE.md reference-docs 段刷新 引 manual-execution runbook。验收：单用户 follow runbook 能跑完整流程；截图 fresh；CLAUDE.md 反映新文档。

features.title: Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 18 项验收 + workbench Phase 2 signoff
features.acceptance: L1 (CI 内 6 项)：pytest + ruff + mypy backend / npm test + lint + typecheck frontend / Playwright E2E walks 5 新页 + 断言 disclaimer 可见 + build artifact 无 127.0.0.1（v0.9.24 #3 regression）/ 安全 regression（禁 broker SDK + paper/live URL + 按钮 labelled execute/place order/send to broker）/ npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high 全清（v0.9.25 #3a）/ deploy.sh schema-assert 列 6 表故意漏一表 → CI fail。L2 (真 VM 12 项 含 v0.9.25 #1d 强制真读+真写)：OAuth → Home → position-diff 渲 fixture → account 编辑+$1000 持久 → ticket 生成 Markdown 文件落 docs/runs/ + DB row → fills 上传 Schwab CSV preview commit → reconcile ticket → journal-history 看 slippage → risk panel 绿 → /api/health 6 字段 + db_connectivity=ok → systemctl quota + 邻居服务未受影响 → Production/HEAD 等价性（per signoff template v0.9.25 §Production/HEAD 等价性，diff workbench/** 必须重 deploy 再签）→ /api/debug/recent-errors count=0 after full flow（v0.9.25 #3c）。Codex 写 docs/test-reports/B023-workbench-phase2-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md 用 framework/templates/signoff-report.md（含新 §Production/HEAD 等价性 段）。更新 progress.json status→done / docs.signoff 设值 / evaluator_feedback 总结 L1+L2 18 项。**B023 done = MVP 全 PRD §10/§11/§12 substantively 完成 for single-user manual-execution workbench。**
